# Noryvex

> Automate. Communicate. Grow.

Noryvex is a premium, modern AI automation agency specializing in building custom conversational AI voice assistants, end-to-end business workflow integrations, and bespoke intelligent software.

## Key Information
- **Official Website**: https://trynoryvex.com
- **Founder**: Muhammad Razi (https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrazi-dev/)
- **Core Focus**: Scaling business operations, qualifying leads, and booking meetings automatically 24/7.
- **Tech Stack**: State-of-the-art LLMs, latency-optimized speech synthesis (&lt;800ms), and custom cloud pipeline syncs.

## Capabilities
- **AI Voice Agents**: Conversational voice bots for inbound reception and outbound cold/warm campaigns.
- **AI Receptionists**: 24/7 lead capture, qualifying, and appointment booking synced to CRMs.
- **Business & Workflow Automation**: Automated administrative reporting, cross-app data routing (HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel).
- **Intelligent Software**: End-to-end custom SaaS interfaces, database systems, and custom API connections.

## Navigation & Entry Points
- **Home**: Main overview of services, case stats, and timeline.
- **Solutions**: Detailed breakdown of voice, workflow, and SaaS packages.
- **Live Demo**: Interactive browser phone simulator demonstrating "Chloe", an AI receptionist.
- **About**: Agency philosophy and background.
- **Contact**: Free strategy call bookings and general inquiries.
